allow: Bash(git commit -m 'fix: add missing /api/run-status route for GitHub Actions polling *)
Bash(sed -i 's/import { list } from "@vercel\\/blob";/import { list } from "@\\/lib\\/storage";/' web/app/api/schedule/tick/route.ts web/app/api/schedule/complete/route.ts)
Bash(sed -i '/^const TOKEN = process.env.BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN!;$/d' web/app/api/schedule/tick/route.ts web/app/api/results/route.ts web/app/api/schedule/complete/route.ts)
Bash(sed -i 's/, token: TOKEN }/ }/g' web/app/api/schedule/tick/route.ts web/app/api/results/route.ts web/app/api/schedule/complete/route.ts)
Bash(sed -i 's/import { list, del } from "@vercel\\/blob";/import { list, del } from "@\\/lib\\/storage";/' web/app/api/results/route.ts)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3911 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep 1; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3911 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { "still listening" } else { "port 3911 free" })
